description: Add UI screens in apps/quantads for the quant-economy features: coin wallet dashboard, virtual goods store, creator marketplace, self-boost interface, subscription management, and gifting/tipping. These are Next.js App Router pages using @quant/shared-ui components, @tanstack/react-query, framer-motion animations, and @quant/brand theming.
steps: Add @quant/quant-economy as a workspace dependency in apps/quantads/package.json

Create apps/quantads/src/app/economy/page.tsx - Economy dashboard landing page showing wallet balance, quick actions (buy coins, boost, store), using Card, Button from @quant/shared-ui, motion animations from framer-motion

Create apps/quantads/src/app/economy/wallet/page.tsx - Coin wallet page showing balance, transaction history, buy-coins buttons (Stripe/Razorpay/UPI options as UI), earn-coins section (daily login claim button, referral link)
Create apps/quantads/src/app/economy/store/page.tsx - Virtual goods store with category tabs (avatars, outfits, skins, themes, stickers, gifts), item cards with price in coins, purchase button

Create apps/quantads/src/app/economy/creator/page.tsx - Creator marketplace showing listed items/game-passes, create listing form, earnings overview with 70/30 split visualization, payout request button
Create apps/quantads/src/app/economy/boost/page.tsx - Self-boost interface with post selector, boost pack tiers (Basic/Standard/Premium), active boosts with analytics (impressions gained, multiplier)
Create apps/quantads/src/app/economy/subscriptions/page.tsx - Subscription tier comparison (Free/Pro/ProPlus/Family), current plan display, upgrade/downgrade buttons, feature entitlement checklist
Create apps/quantads/src/app/economy/layout.tsx - Economy section layout with navigation sidebar/tabs for the sub-pages
Update apps/quantads/tsconfig.json to add path mapping for @quant/quant-economy and add project reference
Verify the quantads app still type-checks: pnpm --filter @quant/quantads typecheck
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantads/src/app/economy/ directory exists with page.tsx, layout.tsx, and subdirectories
All pages are valid React Server/Client components using Next.js App Router patterns
Pages import from @quant/quant-economy types for type safety
UI uses @quant/shared-ui components (Card, Button) and framer-motion for animations
Wallet page shows balance, transaction list, and buy/earn actions
Store page has category-based browsing and purchase flow
Boost page clearly shows it is NOT an ad (no sponsored label in UI)
Subscription page shows all 4 tiers with feature comparison
findings: All 7 economy pages created and committed. The quantads typecheck (pnpm --filter @quant/quantads typecheck) fails with pre-existing TS6305 errors (project references point to dist/ files that have never been built) and two pre-existing TS7006 errors in backend files. These failures exist on the base commit before any changes. The new economy pages introduce zero additional TypeScript errors. Prettier reformatted via pre-commit hook successfully.
